steps.title: Identify the transition pattern
steps.content: The passage introduces “she has also conducted hands-on fieldwork,” then immediately provides specific examples: states where digs occurred (Utah, Montana, Wyoming) and museums displaying her discoveries.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Specifically signals the shift to concrete examples that elaborate on the general claim. The other three all misidentify the relationship: two create false contrasts and one wrongly implies a time sequence. That matches choice C — C is correct.
